About https://matthiasbrat.dev/about/ Wed, 22 Feb 2023 00:00:00 +0000
https://matthiasbrat.dev/about/ I started this blog to get a trace of my work, discoveries and more about my journey in programming. Also I want to share music, pictures and global things about my life and how I see my future in life. I got this template idea from Macawls, which is an awsome dude, you should definitely check his work and his own blog: I hope I will have some fun posting here :) (and some sleep soon).
